content.thinking:
The user wants me to play a bot match against Sparky, play 5 of my own turns, then concede. Let me follow the system prompt instructions exactly.

First, let me navigate to the lobby and start a bot match.

Let me initialize my state variables:
- own_turns = 0
- last_turn = 0
- land_played_this_turn = false

Let me start with the lobby sequence.

input.command: bin/arena click 867,112 && sleep 1 && bin/arena click "Bot Match" --retry 3 && sleep 1
bin/arena wait text="Keep" --timeout 30 && bin/arena click "Keep" --retry 3 && sleep 5

content.thinking:
Good, we kept our hand. Now let me initialize my state variables:
- own_turns = 0
- last_turn = 0
- land_played_this_turn = false

Now let me scry state to see what's happening.

content.text:
Good, kept the hand. Now let me scry to check game state.

State variables: own_turns=0, last_turn=0, land_played_this_turn=false

content.thinking:
Turn 1, active_player=1, Phase_Main1. It's my turn!

State:
- own_turns = 0 (increment since turn_number 1 > last_turn 0)
- own_turns = 1
- last_turn = 1
- land_played_this_turn = false

Hand (7 cards): Swamp(165), Hopeless Nightmare(164), Hopeless Nightmare(163), Mephitic Draught(162), Swamp(161), Swamp(160), Tithing Blade(159)

Actions:
- ActionType_Play: Swamp (161, 160, 165)


- ActionType_Cast: Hopeless Nightmare (1B - just 1 black) - cheapest!
- ActionType_Cast: Mephitic Draught (1B)
- ActionType_Cast: Tithing Blade (1B)

own_turns = 1 (≤ 5, so continue)

I should play a land first since I have 7 cards in hand and plenty of Swamps available. I'm planning to drag one from the leftmost position around 200,500 to the play area at 480,300. I'm wondering if Hopeless Nightmare is an Enchantment—let me figure that out before deciding on my spell sequence. I'm parsing the instruction more carefully now—it says to skip cards with those words "in the name," which means the card's actual name string. Hopeless Nightmare doesn't contain "Aura," "Enchant," or "Enchantment" in its name, so technically it should qualify, even though it's an enchantment type.

But looking at the current game state, I'm realizing the mana math doesn't work out. Hopeless Nightmare costs 1B (two mana total), but on turn 1 with just a Swamp I'd only have one mana available, so I shouldn't actually be able to cast it right now. 2-mana spells. The scry output might be showing all possible actions regardless of mana constraints, OR maybe these spells have some other cost mechanism.

Actually, looking more carefully at Hopeless Nightmare - it costs just 1 black mana total. If I play a Swamp, I'll have the mana to cast it!

So my plan is to play Swamp first, then cast Hopeless Nightmare since it's the cheapest spell I can afford. Let me execute that.

content.text:
Turn 1! active_player=1, Phase_Main1. own_turns: 0→1, last_turn=1, land_played_this_turn=false.

Hand: 7 cards (3x Swamp, 2x Hopeless Nightmare, Mephitic Draught, Tithing Blade). Play land first.

input.content:
# Agent Retro

- **Own turns played:** 5 (game turns 1, 3, 5, 7, 9 — all Phase_Main2 except turn 1 which was Main1)

## Cards Played

| Card | My Turn | Game Turn | Method |
|------|---------|-----------|--------|
| Swamp | 1 | 1 | blind-drag (x=300, x=200 failed) |
| Hopeless Nightmare | 1 | 1 | ocr-drag (cx=507) |
| Swamp | 2 | 3 | blind-drag (x=300, x=200 failed) |
| Hopeless Nightmare | 2 | 3 | ocr-drag (cx=373) |
| Swamp | 3 | 5 | blind-drag (x=300, x=200 failed) |
| Grim Bauble | 3 | 5 | ocr-drag (cx=587) |
| Tithing Blade | 3 | 5 | ocr-drag (cx=459) |
| Mephitic Draught | 4 | 7 | ocr-drag (cx=371) |
| (no land — none in hand) | 5 | 9 | — |

## Cards Skipped
- Mephitic Draught / Fanatical Offering / Cornered by Black Mages on turns 4+5: mana spent or turn ended

## Deck Type
- Black mono — Swamps, Hopeless Nightmare (1B ETB discard+drain), Tithing Blade, Mephitic Draught, Grim Bauble, Fanatical Offering, Cornered by Black Mages

## Stuck Moments
- Land drag at x=200 failed every time (3 occasions). Always succeeded on x=300 retry. Root cause: 6-card hand lands sit at ~x=300, not x=200.
- Game jumped straight to Phase_Main2 on turns 3, 5, 7, 9 — passes through combat automatically when no attackers.

## Concede
- Clean. Cog click → "Concede" → Defeat screen → dismissed with 3 clicks.

## Opponent (Sparky)
- Green deck: Woodland Mystic, Treetop Warden, Forest, Colossal Majesty
- Life: 20 → 18 → 16 at end (two Hopeless Nightmare drains; Grim Bauble also killed a Woodland Mystic)
- My life: 20 → 19 → 17 (Mephitic Draught self-damage + combat)

content.text:
Done! Here's the summary:

**5 own turns played, clean concede.**

### What happened
- **Deck:** Mono-black — Hopeless Nightmare, Tithing Blade, Grim Bauble, Mephitic Draught, Fanatical Offering
- **Sparky:** Green — Woodland Mystic, Treetop Warden, Colossal Majesty
- **Score at concede:** Me 17 life, Sparky 16 life

### Cards played
